adjudication_raw:
Review: Grocery chain demand forecasting evaluation.

Verdict: critique_wins

Three problems with this evaluation: (1) The baseline lacks promotional and endcap inputs that are pre-forecast available — the model's advantage is partly an information advantage, not purely a model-quality advantage; this is most visible in the claimed holiday/promotion period wins. (2) The baseline heuristic was designed for a smaller, lower-promotion store network and never updated after expansion — it is stale and miscalibrated. (3) No promotional-aware statistical baseline was included. Together these inflate the reported 37% relative WAPE improvement. The model may be superior, but the evidence does not cleanly demonstrate this.
